About
关于我

Bridging cognitive science
and data intelligence

用认知科学
驱动数据洞察

I'm a graduating master's student at the University of Toronto with a background in Cognitive Neuroscience (HBSc, GPA 3.46) and hands-on experience in data analysis, machine learning, and AI development.

My unique combination of neuroscience training and technical skills lets me approach data problems from both a human-behavioral and statistical perspective — understanding not just what the data shows, but why people behave the way they do.

我是多伦多大学应届硕士毕业生，本科主修认知神经科学（GPA 3.5），具备数据分析、机器学习与AI开发的实战经验。

神经科学背景与技术能力的结合，让我能从人类行为和统计学两个维度分析数据问题——不仅理解数据呈现了什么，更能洞察背后的行为动因。

项目经历

Work that speaks
for itself

用成果
说话

Student Performance Analysis · Regression + XGBoost

学生成绩影响因素分析与预测 · 回归 + XGBoost

End-to-end ML pipeline on 630K training records. Built hierarchical OLS regression with interaction terms, trained XGBoost (R²=0.783), and applied SHAP to identify study hours, attendance, and sleep quality as key predictors. Click each chart to explore the results.

基于63万条训练数据的端到端机器学习流程。构建含交互项的层次OLS回归，训练XGBoost（R²=0.783），并通过SHAP识别学习时间、出勤率和睡眠质量为核心预测变量。点击每张图可放大查看。

R² = 0.783 RMSE = 8.79 630K Records SHAP Explained

SHAP 特征影响分析

UTChinese Network

多大中文网重构项目

Co-led frontend rebuild replacing Wix with React + HTML5. Implemented bilingual i18n, event modules, UI/UX design, and mobile optimization. Live at utchinese.org.

主导前端重构，使用React+HTML5替代Wix平台。实现中英双语（i18n）、活动模块、UI/UX设计及移动端适配，已上线utchinese.org。

LLM Workflow Optimization
LongShine Technology · 2023

AIGC Internship @ LongShine

朗新科技 AIGC 实习

Designed and tested 3,000+ structured prompts to optimize LLM workflows (+35% accuracy). Built a video transition module with 70+ effects via FFmpeg, and automated text-to-JSON conversion in Python (90%+ success rate).

设计并测试3000+条结构化Prompt，优化大模型工作流（准确率+35%）。开发FFmpeg视频模块（70+转场效果），Python实现文本到JSON自动化转换（成功率90%+）。

AI Workflow
AI 工作流
Co-created with Claude AI 与 Claude AI 协作构建

Built together with AI —
a genuine collaboration

与 AI 真正的协作，
而不只是工具使用

I use AI not just as autocomplete, but as a thought partner — for design direction, architecture decisions, content refinement, and real-time problem solving. This portfolio is a live demonstration of that workflow.

我将AI视为真正的协作伙伴，而不只是代码补全工具——从设计方向、架构决策到内容优化和实时解决问题。本作品集本身就是这种协作方式的实时演示。

How we built this portfolio together
我们如何一起完成这个作品集
Step 1 · Design
第一步 · 设计
Discussed aesthetic direction with Claude — chose purple-blue gradient with clean white sections. Iterated on layout, typography, and color palette through conversation.
与 Claude 讨论设计方向——选定紫蓝渐变配干净白色分区。通过对话不断迭代布局、字体和配色方案。
Step 2 · Content
第二步 · 内容
Claude helped craft bilingual project descriptions, self-introductions, and skill summaries — all grounded in real experience and optimized for clarity and impact.
Claude 协助撰写双语项目描述、自我介绍和技能总结——均基于真实经历，力求表达清晰、重点突出。
Step 3 · Code
第三步 · 代码
Claude generated the full HTML/CSS/JS codebase — including i18n language switching, lightbox gallery, and embedded base64 images. Iterated rapidly based on feedback.
Claude 生成完整的 HTML/CSS/JS 代码库——包括双语切换、图片画廊 lightbox 和 base64 嵌入图片。根据反馈快速迭代。
Step 4 · Animation
第四步 · 动效
Explored 4 hero background options (waves, data rain, neural network, particles) — previewed each as live samples, chose the neural network to reflect a cognitive neuroscience background.
探索了4种 Hero 背景动效方案（波浪、数据雨、神经网络、粒子）——逐一预览后，选择神经网络动效，与认知神经科学背景呼应。
Result · You are here
成果 · 你正在看的这个
A fully bilingual, interactive portfolio — built in one session through natural conversation. No Figma. No boilerplate. Just ideas → execution.
一个完整的双语交互式作品集——在一次对话中从零完成。没有 Figma，没有模板，只有想法到执行。
